name: Spicy Pumpkin Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a mixer, beat eggs until frothy. Beat in sugar for 2 minutes.
3. Add oil and pumpkin. Mix thoroughly.
4. Sift together dry ingredients over the raisins.
5. Fold the dry mixture into the egg mixture. Do not over mix.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until done through.
8. Cool on a rack, then cut into 24 squares.
Variation: Top each square with a toasted walnut half.
